articles.title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
articles.description: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".
articles.titleJa: BBCがイスラエルによるレバノン空爆の現場を訪問、家族が死亡とIDFはヒズボラ標的
articles.summary: イスラエルがレバノンに空爆を行い家族が死亡した現場をBBCが取材。親族は犠牲者が民間人だと訴える一方、IDFはテロインフラを標的としたと説明した。

articles.title: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
articles.description: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.
articles.titleJa: ゼレンスキー大統領、石油パイプライン問題でEU同盟国を「恐喝」と非難
articles.summary: ゼレンスキー大統領は、ロシア産石油をウクライナ経由でEUに供給再開することは、対ロシア制裁解除に等しいとして、EU同盟国を非難した。

articles.title: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
articles.description: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.
articles.titleJa: ケニアで深刻な洪水により66人死亡、豪雨続く
articles.summary: ケニアで続く豪雨により、深刻な洪水が発生し、これまでに66人が死亡。首都ナイロビでは、浸水したミニバスから11人が救助された。

articles.title: Sweden detains captain of Russian shadow fleet ship
articles.description: The skipper of the Sea Owl One is suspected of producing forged documents when it was boarded by coast guard.
articles.titleJa: スウェーデン、ロシアのシャドー艦隊船長を拘束
articles.summary: スウェーデン沿岸警備隊が「シー・アウル・ワン」号を臨検した際、船長が偽造書類を作成した疑いで拘束された。同船はロシアのシャドー艦隊に属するとされる。

articles.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian couple and two of their children in occupied West Bank
articles.description: Mohammed, aged five, and Othman, aged seven, were killed alongside their parents, the Palestinian health ministry says.
articles.titleJa: イスラエル軍、占領下のヨルダン川西岸でパレスチナ人夫婦と子供2人を殺害
articles.summary: パレスチナ保健省によると、占領下のヨルダン川西岸でイスラエル軍がパレスチナ人夫婦と、5歳と7歳の2人の子供を殺害した。

articles.title: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
articles.description: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.
articles.titleJa: 米国、イラクでの空中給油機墜落で死亡した乗組員6人の氏名を公表
articles.summary: イラク西部で対イラン作戦中の米軍空中給油機が墜落し、乗組員6人が死亡した。米国は犠牲者の氏名を公表した。

articles.title: Iran captain latest footballer to drop asylum bid, Iranian state media says
articles.description: Five of the seven members of the women's football delegation who originally sought to stay in Australia have now chosen to return home.
articles.titleJa: イラン女子サッカー主将、亡命申請を取り下げた最新の選手に
articles.summary: イラン国営メディアによると、女子サッカー代表団の主将が豪州での亡命申請を取り下げた。当初亡命を求めていた7人中5人が帰国を選択している。

articles.title: French police detain brothers over 'lethal and antisemitic' plot
articles.description: A loaded gun, hydrochloric acid and an Islamic State flag were found in their car, prosecutors say.
articles.titleJa: フランス警察、致命的で反ユダヤ主義的な陰謀を巡り兄弟を拘束
articles.summary: フランス警察は、致命的かつ反ユダヤ主義的な陰謀に関与した疑いで兄弟を拘束した。検察によると、車内から装填された銃やISの旗が発見された。

articles.title: Treasure hunter freed from prison after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
articles.description: Tommy Thompson spent more than a decade in prison after refusing to disclose the whereabouts of 500 missing gold coins.
articles.titleJa: 難破船の金塊引き渡し拒否で投獄されたトレジャーハンターが釈放
articles.summary: 難破船から見つかった500枚の金貨の所在を明かすことを拒否し、10年以上投獄されていたトレジャーハンターのトミー・トンプソンが釈放された。

articles.title: Ugandan opposition leader goes abroad after two months in hiding
articles.description: Uganda's military chief has said Bobi Wine is wanted "dead or alive", although some ministers have denied he is being sought.
articles.titleJa: ウガンダの野党指導者、2ヶ月間の潜伏期間を経て海外へ
articles.summary: ウガンダの野党指導者ボビ・ワイン氏が2ヶ月間の潜伏期間を経て海外へ出国した。同国軍参謀長は、氏を「生死を問わず」捜索していると発言していた。

articles.title: Hungary's rival parties hold parallel rallies ahead of vote
articles.description: Viktor Orban is facing his first serious challenge in years in Peter Magyar. The two politicians held rallies on Hungary's national day that outlined very different visions for the country's future.
articles.titleJa: ハンガリーのライバル政党が選挙を前に並行集会を開催
articles.summary: ハンガリーで、オルバン首相とマガールの二人の政治家が異なる国家ビジョンを掲げ、選挙前の並行集会を実施。オルバン首相にとって数年ぶりの試練となる。

articles.title: War, oppression and fear: In Iran, traumas are accumulating
articles.description: Bombs, government oppression and fear are wearing down Iranians. How does trauma accumulate? And what can help people endure constant stress?
articles.titleJa: 戦争、抑圧、恐怖：イランで蓄積されるトラウマ
articles.summary: イランでは、爆弾、政府による抑圧、恐怖により国民のトラウマが蓄積。人々が絶え間ないストレスに耐える方法が問われている。

articles.title: Kosovo faces third legislative election in just over a year
articles.description: Kosovo’s failure to elect a president has again plunged the nation into political deadlock. Now, it could face its third parliamentary election in just over a year. The country's international reputation is taking a hit.
articles.titleJa: コソボ、1年強で3度目の議会選挙に直面
articles.summary: 大統領選出の失敗により政治的膠着状態に陥ったコソボは、1年強で3度目の議会選挙の可能性。国の国際的評判に影響が出ている。

articles.title: Iran says women's soccer captain drops Australia asylum bid
articles.description: Five of the seven women who had been granted asylum in Australia have reportedly decided to return to Iran. Concerns about their safety arose after players remained silent during the Iranian national anthem.
articles.titleJa: イラン、女子サッカー主将が豪州亡命申請を取り下げたと発表
articles.summary: オーストラリアで亡命を認められていたイラン女子サッカーの選手たちが帰国を決定。イラン国歌斉唱時の沈黙後、安全への懸念が高まっていた。

articles.title: Israeli troops kill Palestinian family of 4 in West Bank
articles.description: A Palestinian family of four has been killed after Israeli forces opened fire on a vehicle in the occupied West Bank. In Gaza, a family of three and a teenage neighbor were killed in an apparent Israeli strike.
articles.titleJa: イスラエル軍、ヨルダン川西岸でパレスチナ人一家4人を殺害
articles.summary: イスラエル軍がヨルダン川西岸で車両に発砲し、パレスチナ人一家4人が死亡。ガザでもイスラエルによる攻撃で別の家族が犠牲になった。

articles.title: Civil war in Sudan is a never-ending humanitarian crisis
articles.description: Almost three years into Sudan's war, drone attacks and sexual violence show no signs of relenting. Could intensified international efforts influence the situation?
articles.titleJa: スーダン内戦、終わりのない人道危機に
articles.summary: スーダンでの内戦は3年近く続き、ドローン攻撃や性的暴力が止む気配なし。国際社会の努力が状況を変えるか注目される。

articles.title: Kenya minister flies to Russia to halt illegal army hiring
articles.description: Foreign Minister Musalia Mudavadi is in Moscow to stop the forced recruitment of Kenyans to fight against Ukraine. Over 1,000 citizens were reportedly duped by civilian job offers before being sent to the front line.
articles.titleJa: ケニア大臣、違法な軍隊雇用を阻止するためロシアへ飛ぶ
articles.summary: ケニア外相がロシアを訪問し、ウクライナでの戦闘のためのケニア人強制徴用停止を求める。1000人以上が民間職と偽られ戦線に送られたとされる。

articles.title: Uganda's Bobi Wine says he has fled the country
articles.description: Ugandan opposition leader Bobi Wine says he has left the country after two months in hiding following January elections. Wine has alleged that the result, which kept President Yoweri Museveni in power, was fradulent.
articles.titleJa: ウガンダのボビ・ワイン氏、国外逃亡を表明
articles.summary: ウガンダの野党指導者ボビ・ワイン氏が、1月の選挙後2か月の潜伏を経て国外へ脱出したと発表。選挙結果の不正を主張している。

articles.title: Republic of Congo votes in presidential election
articles.description: President Dennis Sassou N'Guesso, 82, seems set to win a fifth term in a row in Sunday's election in the Republic of Congo. Sassou N'Guesso is already one of Africa's longest-serving leaders.
articles.titleJa: コンゴ共和国、大統領選挙で投票実施
articles.summary: コンゴ共和国で大統領選挙が行われ、82歳のサスヌゲソ大統領が5期連続当選の見込み。彼はアフリカで最も長く権力に留まる指導者の一人。

articles.title: Germany news: Merz faces new election test in Hesse
articles.description: The far-right Alternative for Germany party is poised for fresh gains in municipal elections in the central state of Hesse. As fuel prices soar, German MPs are urging measures to offset the pain. DW has the latest.
articles.titleJa: ドイツニュース：メルツ氏、ヘッセン州で新たな選挙の試練に直面
articles.summary: ドイツのヘッセン州議会選挙で、極右政党AfDがさらなる議席獲得の勢い。燃料価格の高騰を受け、ドイツ議員は国民への対策を求めている。

articles.title: Nigeria’s online content creator market has boomed. Can the skit-makers and streamers make it pay?
articles.description:
As platforms make less from advertising, creators are struggling to monetise work – leading to calls for more government investment and tax breaks
On a humid afternoon in Lagos, a shoot for a comedy skit is under way on a set that looks more like a small film production.
Dozens of people mill about: lighting assistants, a sound engineer, a makeup artist and even a content creator recording unscripted behind-the-scenes footage. At the centre is Broda Shaggi, born Samuel Animashaun Perry, who is issuing instructions, rehearsing lines and performing caricatures.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ナイジェリアのオンラインコンテンツクリエイター市場は急成長。スキットメーカーやストリーマーは収益化できるか？
articles.summary: ナイジェリアのオンラインコンテンツクリエイター市場は活況を呈しているが、広告収入の減少により収益化が課題となっている。政府投資や税制優遇措置を求める声が上がっている。

articles.title: France returns sacred talking drum looted from Côte d’Ivoire over 100 years ago
articles.description:
Djidji Ayôkwé was handed to Ivorian officials in Paris earlier this month
A sacred artefact looted by French colonial authorities more than a century ago has been returned to Côte d’Ivoire in one of the most significant cultural restitutions to a former French colony in years.
The Djidji Ayôkwé, a talking drum confiscated in 1916 by French administrators, landed at 8.45am on Friday at the airport in Port Bouët on the outskirts of the economic capital, Abidjan. It was handed over to Ivorian officials in Paris earlier this month after being removed from the Quai Branly – Jacques Chirac Museum.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: フランス、100年以上前にコートジボワールから略奪された聖なるトーキングドラムを返還
articles.summary: 100年以上前にフランス植民地当局に略奪された聖なるトーキングドラム「ジジ・アヨクウェ」が、コートジボワールに返還された。これは旧フランス植民地への文化財返還で最も重要なものの一つ。

articles.title: Eswatini says it received more ‘third country’ deportees as part of deal with Trump administration
articles.description:
Two deportees sent to Eswatini were from Somalia, one was from Sudan and another was from Tanzania
The government of Eswatini announced on Thursday it received four more “third country” deportees from the United States, as part of the Trump administration’s multimillion-dollar deal with the small African nation.
Now a total of 19 deportees from the US have been sent to Eswatini even as they hail from other countries, amid the Trump administration’s continued anti-immigrant crackdown and changes to immigration policy.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: エスワティニ、トランプ政権との合意の一環で「第三国」からの強制送還者をさらに受け入れたと発表
articles.summary: エスワティニ政府は、トランプ政権との数百万ドル規模の合意に基づき、米国からさらに4人の「第三国」強制送還者を受け入れたと発表。合計19人が本国とは異なる国から送還されている。

articles.title: UK government axes flagship global health project
articles.description:
Programme which supports schemes in six African countries was previously hailed as vital protection for Britain against future pandemics
A flagship health project in Africa, which UK ministers said would play a vital role in protecting Britain from future pandemic threats, is being axed due to aid cuts, the Guardian can reveal.
The Global Health Workforce Programme (GHWP) which supported development and training for healthcare staff in six African countries, will close at the end of the month, the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) said.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 英国政府、主要なグローバルヘルスプロジェクトを中止
articles.summary: 英国政府は、将来のパンデミックから英国を守る上で極めて重要とされていたアフリカの主要な保健プロジェクトを、援助削減のため中止すると発表した。6カ国で医療従事者の育成を支援していた。

articles.title: ‘Invasive’ AI-led mass surveillance in Africa violating freedoms, warn experts
articles.description:
Countries across the continent have spent more than $2bn on Chinese tracking technology that is not ‘necessary or proportionate’, new report finds
The rapid expansion of AI-powered mass-surveillance systems across Africa is violating citizens’ right to privacy and having a chilling effect on society, according to experts on human rights and emerging technologies.
At least $2bn (£1.5bn) has been spent by 11 African governments on Chinese-built surveillance technology that recognises faces and monitors movements, according to a new report by the Institute of Development Studies, which warns that national security is being used to justify implementing these systems with little regulation.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「侵襲的な」AIによるアフリカでの大規模監視が自由を侵害している、と専門家が警告
articles.summary: アフリカ全土でAIを活用した大規模監視システムの急速な拡大が、市民のプライバシー権を侵害し、社会に冷え込みをもたらしていると専門家が警告。アフリカ11カ国が中国製監視技術に20億ドル以上を費やしている。

articles.title: Cory Booker calls both parties ‘feckless’ for ceding war powers to Trump
articles.description:
Democrat says Congress ‘doing nothing’ may embolden president to attack countries such as Cuba and North Korea
Democratic US senator Cory Booker has criticized both his own political party as well as its Republican counterpart for being “feckless” in ceding congressional war powers to Donald Trump, saying that their decision could embolden the president to unilaterally attack Cuba, North Korea and other countries.
“I’m going to be one of those Democrats [who] say I think both parties have been feckless in allowing the growth of the power of the presidency,” Booker said on Sunday on CNN’s State of the Union.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: コリー・ブッカー、両党がトランプに戦争権限を譲ったことを「無能」と批判
articles.summary: 民主党のコリー・ブッカー上院議員は、議会の戦争権限をトランプ大統領に譲り渡したことについて、自身の党と共和党の両方を「無能」と批判。これにより、大統領が一方的に他国を攻撃する可能性が高まることを懸念している。

articles.title: Five arrested in Cuba after protest at local Communist party office
articles.description:
Rare action began peacefully but ‘degenerated into vandalism’ according to state-run newspaper
Five people have been arrested in Cuba for acts of “vandalism” after a small group of protesters broke into a provincial office of the Cuban Communist party and set fire to computers and furniture.
The incident, which also affected a pharmacy and another shop, took place in the town of Moron, a little more than 300 miles (500km) east of Havana.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: キューバで地方共産党事務所での抗議活動後、5人が逮捕
articles.summary: キューバのモロンで、共産党地方事務所に侵入し、コンピューターや家具に放火した抗議活動の後、5人が逮捕された。この事件は薬局や他の店舗にも影響を与えた。

articles.title: Bolivia arrests alleged drug kingpin accused of putting hit on Paraguayan prosecutor
articles.description:
Bolivian interior ministry says Sebastián Marset is being extradited to US, where he’s wanted for money laundering

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

Sebastián Marset, an alleged Uruguayan drug trafficker and one of South America’s most wanted criminals, has been arrested in Bolivia.
Marset, 34, is accused of trafficking tonnes of cocaine from South America to Europe, and also of having ordered the murder of a Paraguayan prosecutor who was shot dead as he honeymooned on a Colombian beach in 2022.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ボリビア、パラグアイ検察官殺害を指示したとされる麻薬王を逮捕
articles.summary: ボリビアで、南米で最も指名手配されている犯罪者の一人であり、パラグアイ検察官の殺害を命じたとされるウルグアイ人麻薬密売人セバスチャン・マルセットが逮捕された。彼は米国でマネーロンダリングの罪で指名手配されている。

articles.title: An environmental activist and her family escaped death threats in Honduras. ICE deported her husband anyway
articles.description:
Oscar, Ana and their children fled violence for safety in the US. Now Oscar, afraid and alone, is back in Honduras – ‘at the mercy of God and his will’ 
As soon as Oscar’s deportation flight landed at the La Lima airport in Honduras, he put on his baseball cap. On the airport shuttle toward the terminal, he pulled his cap even lower – trying to obscure his face at various police checkpoints.
His parents picked him up in a car, and drove him to a lodging they had arranged for him – miles away from his family home. He has hardly stepped outside since. “Because I can’t trust anyone – not the authorities, not the government, not a police officer,” he said. He has visited his mother a handful of times since the US deported him three weeks ago, and only under the cover of night. “They will kill anyone here. There is death everywhere.”
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 環境活動家とその家族はホンジュラスで殺害の脅迫から逃れたが、ICEは夫を強制送還
articles.summary: ホンジュラスで殺害の脅迫を受けていた環境活動家の夫が、米国に逃れたにもかかわらず強制送還され、再び危険な状態に置かれた。彼は身の安全を案じ、隠れて生活している。

articles.title: Cuban president confirms talks with Trump officials amid US blockade
articles.description:
Negotiations aimed to ‘find solutions to the bilateral differences’ between the countries, Miguel Díaz-Canel said
Cuban officials have held talks with the US government, the country’s president, Miguel Díaz-Canel, confirmed on Friday, amid growing pain inflicted by a punishing US fuel blockade and frequent power failures.
“These talks have been aimed at finding solutions through dialogue to the bilateral differences we have between the two nations,” Díaz-Canel said in a prerecorded statement to senior Communist officials.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: キューバ大統領、米国封鎖中のトランプ政権当局者との会談を確認
articles.summary: キューバのミゲル・ディアス＝カネル大統領は、厳しい米国の燃料禁輸と頻繁な停電が続く中、米国政府と会談を行ったことを確認した。対話を通じて二国間の相違点の解決を目指したと述べた。

articles.title: 'Orbán betrayed Hungarian freedom': Magyar accuses PM of inviting Russian agents to rig the vote
articles.description: Opposition leader Péter Magyar called Viktor Orbán a traitor at a Budapest rally, accusing him of enlisting Russian agents to interfere in Hungary's 6 April elections, as polls show Tisza ahead of Fidesz.
articles.titleJa: 「オルバーンはハンガリーの自由を裏切った」：マジャル氏、首相がロシアの工作員を招き選挙を不正操作したと非難
articles.summary: ハンガリーの野党指導者マジャル氏は、オルバーン首相がロシアの工作員を招き4月の選挙を不正操作したと非難し、国民を裏切ったとブダペストの集会で訴えた。

articles.title: Latest news bulletin | March 15th, 2026 – Evening
articles.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this March 15th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.
articles.titleJa: 最新ニュース速報 | 2026年3月15日 – 夕方
articles.summary: 2026年3月15日夕方の最新ニュース速報。ヨーロッパ内外のビジネス、エンターテイメント、政治、文化、旅行など、重要な出来事を網羅する。

articles.title: 'Our sons will not die for Ukraine,' Orbán tells supporters ahead of crucial April elections
articles.description: Hungarian PM Viktor Orbán rallied supporters in Budapest, framing April's election as a choice between peace and war, while lashing out at Ukraine's Zelenskyy and the EU over the Druzhba pipeline dispute.
articles.titleJa: 「我らの息子はウクライナのために死なない」オルバーン首相、重要な4月選挙を前に支持者に語る
articles.summary: ハンガリーのオルバーン首相はブダペストで支持者を前に、4月の選挙は平和か戦争かの選択だと述べ、ウクライナのゼレンスキー大統領やEUを批判した。

articles.title: Zelenskyy says ready for another round of peace talks but waiting on US and Russia
articles.description: US-led peace talks between Ukraine and Russia had been under way in the United Arab Emirates but were placed on hold amid the Iran war.
articles.titleJa: ゼレンスキー大統領、新たな和平交渉準備を表明も、米国とロシアの出方を待つ
articles.summary: ゼレンスキー大統領は、米国とロシアの新たな和平交渉の準備ができているが、両国の動向を待っていると表明した。ウクライナとロシアの和平協議はイラン戦争により中断されている。

articles.title: North Korea conducts test of nuclear-capable rocket launchers
articles.description: South Korea’s military said Saturday it detected about 10 ballistic missiles fired from North Korea’s capital region toward the eastern sea. The launch coincides with US-South Korean Freedom Shield training, a computer-simulated command post exercise.
articles.titleJa: 北朝鮮、核弾頭搭載可能なロケットランチャーの試験を実施
articles.summary: 韓国軍は、北朝鮮が首都地域から東方海域へ弾道ミサイル約10発を発射したと発表。これは米韓合同軍事演習「フリーダムシールド」と時期が重なる。

articles.title: Kimi Antonelli takes first F1 win with victory in China to extend Mercedes' start
articles.description: The only driver younger than Antonelli to win a Grand Prix was Max Verstappen, who was 18 when he took his first victory in 2016.
articles.titleJa: キミ・アントネッリ、中国GPで初優勝を飾りメルセデスでのスタートを飾る

Thanking members for supporting Uzbekistan's accession during a very busy period, he reaffirmed the country's commitment to engage constructively with all Working Party members. Uzbekistan stands ready to address any remaining issues in a spirit of partnership and mutual understanding, he added.

articles.description: Why do economies negotiate trade agreements? If unilateral free trade can benefit an economy, why do governments devote so much effort to negotiating reciprocal tariff reductions and detailed trade rules with their partners? The answer lies in a fundamental feature of trade policy: when governments act independently, their policies affect not only their own economies but also the economies of others.
articles.titleJa: WTOの価値：経済学の視点から（全6回）
articles.summary: 一方的な自由貿易ではなく、なぜ政府が貿易協定交渉に尽力するのか、その経済的理由と、貿易政策の国際的な相互影響を解説する記事。

articles.title: Coordinators of Plastics Dialogue ready ministerial statement and other outcomes for MC14
articles.description: The coordinators of the Dialogue on Plastics Pollution and Environmentally Sustainable Plastics Trade (DPP) on 6 March finalized the ministerial statement for the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14), scheduled to take place on 26-29 March in Cameroon. The statement was first introduced by the co coordinators in November 2025 and has been continuously updated to reflect members’ perspectives following intensive consultations.
articles.titleJa: プラスチック対話の調整役がMC14に向け閣僚声明と他の成果を準備
articles.summary: プラスチック汚染と持続可能なプラスチック貿易に関する対話の調整役が、カメルーンで開催される第14回閣僚会議（MC14）に向けた閣僚声明を最終決定した。

articles.title: DG Okonjo-Iweala urges members to explore new ways to revitalize WTO at South-South event
articles.description: Speaking at the 8th South-South Dialogue on Least-Developed Countries (LDCs) and Development on 6 March in Geneva, Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala highlighted the importance of members' work to reform the WTO in the run-up to the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) to be held on 26-29 March. She acknowledged the progress they have made in addressing LDCs’ trade priorities and encouraged LDCs to continue pursuing their trade interests.
articles.titleJa: オコンジョ＝イウェアラ事務局長、南南イベントでWTO活性化の新方法を模索するよう加盟国に要請
articles.summary: オコンジョ＝イウェアラ事務局長は、南南対話で後発開発途上国の貿易優先事項に取り組む重要性を強調し、WTO改革の新方法を探るよう加盟国に促した。

articles.title: Chair of agriculture talks circulates revised draft text, as MC14 outline emerges
articles.description: The Chair of the negotiations on agriculture, Ambassador Ali Sarfraz Hussain (Pakistan), has circulated a revised draft text ahead of the WTO’s 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Yaoundé, Cameroon, from 26 to 29 March. Most WTO members welcomed the draft as a basis for consensus at a meeting of the negotiating body on 6 March, although a couple of members said they do not find it acceptable in its current form.
articles.titleJa: 農業交渉議長が改訂草案を回覧、MC14の概要が明らかに
articles.summary: 農業交渉議長がWTO第14回閣僚会議（MC14）に先立ち改訂された草案を回覧した。多くの加盟国はこれを合意の基礎として歓迎した。
